# AC-2 Account Management
Approved Wording: SentinelAI provisions, modifies, disables, and removes accounts through a documented account lifecycle. Privileged accounts are reviewed quarterly and disabled after 30 days of inactivity. Account changes are logged to the customer's audit feed.
